summary: CRITICAL: Bump-Version.Tests.ps1 is missing but workflow references it (line 22 of .yml runs './Bump-Version.Tests.ps1'). Task requires Pester tests written first via red/green TDD; none provided. Security: actions/checkout@v4 unpinned (task requires SHA pinning + version comment). PowerShell: missing Set-StrictMode, no global -ErrorAction Stop. Duplicate logic: Get-BumpType and New-ChangelogEntry both detect BREAKING CHANGE (lines ~50, ~100). Workflow output parsing convoluted (BUMPER_ prefix injection, lines 38-40). Act test harness tight-coupled to output format string matching. Incomplete, not shippable.
